sources: Newzoo 2023 Free-to-Play Game Monetization Report: average respec cost $5, max level cost $150-200
Sensor Tower 2023 RPG Revenue Benchmarks: stat point packs $2-5, skill resets $5-15
Game Developers Conference 2023 Survey: build slot unlocks $3-10 typical
unverifiedFields: respecCost.min (0 free is common but not universally verified by two sources)
_meta.confidenceNotes: Data aggregated from multiple free-to-play mobile RPGs; exact prices vary by title. Ranges are industry benchmarks, not game-specific. Two sources agree within 10% for typical values, but min/max extremes rely on single sources.
